name: HMAC sign + timing-safe verify
task: Create /tmp/eval_hm/hm.py with two functions: hmac_sign(message: str, key: str) returns the HMAC-SHA256 hex digest (str) using the stdlib hmac module — encode message and key to bytes (UTF-8) yourself; hmac_verify(message: str, key: str, signature: str) returns True iff signature matches, using hmac.compare_digest for timing-safe comparison.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_hm/hm.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); sig = mod.hmac_sign('hello','secret'); assert mod.hmac_verify('hello','secret',sig); assert not mod.hmac_verify('hello','wrong',sig); assert not mod.hmac_verify('tampered','secret',sig); print('OK')
